calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETTLEMENT CONF HELD. ACTION SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS:PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 909 GEARY ST., #429, SAN FRANCICO, CA. THE AGREEMENT UNDER WHICHTHE DEFT HOLDS THE ABOVE PREMISES IS DECLARED FORFEITED.AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE ABOVE PREMISES WILL ISSUE, AND PLTF WILL DEPOSIT EVICTION FEES WITH THE SHERIFF OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FOR PREPOSTING OF THE PREMISES; HOWEVER, PLTF WILL STAY EXECUTION OF THIS WRIT ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFTS VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5PM ON AUG. 29, 2004. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY THAT DATE AND TIME, WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION FOR ANY REASON.DEFT WAIVES ANY RIGHT TO MAKE A MOTION TO SET ASIDE OR VACATE THIS STIPULATED JUDGMENT OR TO APPLY FOR A STAY OF EXECUTION OR FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE. PLTF WILL HAVE JUDGEMENT FOR $0 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES.IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY THE ABOVE DATE AND TIME, PLTF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $2083.50 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $15.43 PER DAY FROM JULY 1, 2004 THROUGH AUG. 29, 2004, ALONG WITH COST OF $240.30, AND ATTY FEES OF $0, FOR A TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $3326.75.ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AT PREMISES AFTER AUG 29, 2004, IS DEEMED TO BE ABANDONED AND MAY BE DISPOSED OF AS PLTF SEES FIT.SECURITY DEPOSIT FOR PREMISES,IF ANY, IS DECLARED FORFEITED TO PLTF, ETC. FOR FURTHER TERMS OF THIS STIPULATION, SEE JUDGMENT.PLTF CSL:ARNOLD EVJE,ESQ;DEFT IN PRO PER; JUDGE PRO TEM:JASON STEIN;CLERK-BBSURRATT;NOT REPORTED.
